name: Xorapat
overview: Amrit and Amrita are bound by the bond of love.According to the consent of both houses the consensual marriage was solemnized.And at the same time in the city Devaraj Borbora son of famous businessman Kuldip Borbora is in love with Amrita.Devaraj proposed for marry.But Amrita did not accept Devaraj’s proposal because of Amrit.Devaraj’s mind became stubborn.
